name: Italiano Meat Pie/ak
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Brown beef in a large skillet.
3. Drain the beef.
4. Add chopped green pepper and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in water, tomato paste, and spaghetti sauce mix. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Sprinkle half of the grated Parmesan cheese over the bottom of the pie shell.
7. Spread half of the meat mixture into the pie shell.
8. Sprinkle 1 cup of the grated mozzarella cheese over the meat.
9. Layer remaining meat and Parmesan cheese on top.
10. Bake in a preheated oven for 15 minutes.
11. Sprinkle the remaining mozzarella cheese on top.
12. Return to oven until cheese melts and browns. Serves 6.
